articles.title: Graham Platner withdraws from Maine Senate race, kicking off Democrats’ quest for nominee
articles.description:
“I seek to further the movement we have built together and the future we believe in,” he went on, without detailing what that meant.

The post Graham Platner withdraws from Maine Senate race, kicking off Democrats’ quest for nominee appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Graham Platner withdrew from the Maine Senate race on July 10, 2026.
His withdrawal opens the field for Democratic candidates in the upcoming election.
Boston residents may see increased campaigning as Democrats seek a strong nominee.

articles.title: Christian Gonzalez responds to report that he isn’t physical enough for Patriots
articles.description:
Gonzalez directly called out the reporter, Greg Bedard, on social media Friday.

summary: Christian Gonzalez defended himself against criticism from reporter Greg Bedard on social media.
Gonzalez's response highlights the scrutiny faced by Patriots players in Boston media.
Local fans may rally behind Gonzalez, impacting team morale and community support.

articles.title: US demands Iran publicly state that Strait of Hormuz is open and Tehran won’t attack ships anymore
articles.description:
Israel Katz, Israel's defense minister, also renewed threats that his nation stood ready to confront Iran if needed.

summary: US demands Iran confirm Strait of Hormuz is open to ensure maritime safety.
